description: The McCarthy-Dundon gang is a criminal organization based in Limerick City, Ireland, involved in drug dealing, extortion, and armed robbery. Founded in the 2000s by James McCarthy and Dessie Dundon, the gang has been a central player in the Limerick feud, which has claimed up to 13 lives. The gang has been responsible for high-profile murders of innocent people and has been largely inactive since 2010 after its leaders were imprisoned.

country_links.evidence_quote: The cars, worth €150,000 and registered to brothers and senior gang members, Wayne and Gerard Dundon, were imported from Germany where they had been modified with bullet-proof glass and reinforced armoured doors.
country_links.context: The gang imported bullet-proof BMWs from Germany that had been modified there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Two gang members were convicted in 2008 of conspiring to possess weapons after a joint operation between Gardaí and undercover agents from the Serious Organised Crime Agency in the UK .
country_links.context: The gang conspired to import weapons from the UK, with undercover agents from the Serious Organised Crime Agency involved.
